name: adiblasi/braillewright
description: Accessibility-first in-house fork of the GPL Period theme + Period Pro plugin. This manifest provides the dev-only PHP tooling (coding standards, PHP 8.3 compatibility, static analysis) used by CI; the theme and plugin themselves have no runtime Composer dependencies.

scripts-descriptions.lint:fix: Auto-fix the PHPCS findings that are safely fixable.
scripts-descriptions.analyse: PHPStan static analysis with WordPress stubs (phpstan.neon.dist).
scripts-descriptions.analyse:baseline: Regenerate the PHPStan baseline so analysis can become a blocking gate.
scripts-descriptions.ci: Run lint + compat + analyse in sequence (local mirror of the CI gates).
